gist.headline: Polishing the Portkey
gist.blurb: We've updated our deployment scripts to sync the production Portkey gateway with the latest upstream changes. Just keeping the text-generation infrastructure humming along smoothly!
gist.summary: Updated the production Portkey deployment script to pin the gateway to the latest synced commit.
gist.impact: Maintains the reliability and currency of the text generation infrastructure by syncing with upstream gateway improvements.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee wearing a tiny hardhat, adjusting a glowing stone archway (representing the Portkey gateway) with a wrench. Focus on infrastructure maintenance and portals.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny yellow hardhat, using a wrench to adjust a glowing lime green (#ecf874) stone archway portal. Soft pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny yellow hardhat, using a wrench to adjust a glowing lime green (#ecf874) stone archway portal. Soft pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
